intent: process the first sample with scanpy

blocks.text: I'll present a plan for processing the first sample with scanpy before running it.

blocks.content: {"status": "ok", "name": "scrna-qc-clustering", "body": "scRNA-seq QC+clustering (scanpy): read 10x; calculate_qc_metrics; filter n_genes>=200 & pct_mito<0.20; normalize_total(1e4)+log1p; highly_variable_genes; pca; neighbors; umap; leiden; rank_genes_groups. Plots: HVG plot and PCA variance side-by-side; UMAP colored by leiden; use sc.pl.* not hand-rolled matplotlib."}

blocks.text: Now let me present the plan:

input.title: Process GSM5746259 (Patient 145, Day 0) with scanpy
input.summary: End-to-end scRNA-seq QC, normalization, HVG selection, dimensionality reduction, clustering, and marker gene identification

steps.title: Load the first sample
steps.description: Read GSM5746259 count matrix from disk and create AnnData object

steps.title: Calculate QC metrics
steps.description: Compute n_genes, n_counts, and percent mitochondrial genes per cell using sc.pp.calculate_qc_metrics()

steps.title: QC filtering
steps.description: Filter cells: n_genes >= 200, percent_mito < 0.20; remove genes expressed in < 3 cells

steps.title: Highly variable genes (HVG)
steps.description: sc.pp.highly_variable_genes() with default parameters; keep top ~2000
expected_outputs: HVG selection plot; n_top_genes variable set

steps.title: PCA & nearest neighbors
steps.description: sc.tl.pca() then sc.pp.neighbors() on HVGs; PC variance scree plot
expected_outputs: PCA reduction; 30 PCs; neighbor graph; variance plot

steps.title: UMAP & Leiden clustering
steps.description: sc.tl.umap() and sc.tl.leiden(resolution=1.0) for initial clustering
expected_outputs: UMAP plot colored by leiden cluster; cluster sizes

steps.title: Marker genes
expected_outputs: Marker gene table; top markers per cluster plot

assumptions: Using the first sample only (GSM5746259, Patient 145 Day 0)
Mitochondrial genes are identified by 'MT-' prefix (human HGNC convention)
QC filter thresholds: n_genes >= 200, percent_mito < 0.20 (standard for PBMCs)
